description_long: This stool features a round, cushioned seat upholstered in a deep red fabric with a subtle gold trim along the edge, giving it a refined appearance. The seat is supported by a single, sturdy metallic pedestal that extends down to a wide, circular base for stability. Midway down the pedestal, there is a prominent circular ring element, adding a distinctive decorative and structural touch. The metallic components have a brushed, slightly glossy finish, suggesting durability and a modern industrial aesthetic. The stool lacks a backrest and footrest, emphasizing its minimalist, functional design. Its proportions and materials make it suitable for use in public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or urban plazas.
description: A modern stool with a red cushioned round seat, gold trim, and a single metallic pedestal featuring a decorative ring and wide base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red cushioned seat, gold trim, and the prominent circular ring on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical pedestal and the absence of the circular ring, with the metallic base and seat visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, again showing the circular ring and the round seat with gold trim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, focusing on the smooth metallic pedestal and base, with the seat and gold trim visible.
